cast.name: Daniel Vergara
cast.character: OAS Secretary General José A. Mora

plot outline: In October 1962, President John F. Kennedy (Greenwood) learns about the Soviet Union's plan of placing nuclear weapons in Cuba. These weapons could wipe out most of the eastern and southern United States in minutes if they become operational. Kennedy and his advisors must come up with a plan of action against the Soviets.
title: Thirteen Days
akas: Treze Dias que Abalaram o Mundo (Brazil)
